entries.title: Speed of Sound
entries.content: Sound travels ~343 m/s in air at 20°C. Faster in water and steel. Supersonic means faster than sound.

entries.title: Human Body Facts
entries.content: Adult human has ~206 bones, ~37 trillion cells, and heart beats ~100,000 times per day. Brain uses ~20% of body's energy.

entries.title: Periodic Table
entries.content: 118 known elements. Organized by atomic number. Metals left/center, nonmetals right, noble gases far right column.

entries.title: Pi (π)
entries.content: Ratio of circle circumference to diameter ≈ 3.14159. Irrational—decimal never ends or repeats.

entries.title: Absolute Zero
entries.content: Lowest possible temperature: 0 Kelvin = −273.15°C. Atoms have minimum motion. Unreachable in practice but approached in labs.

entries.title: World Population
entries.content: Over 8 billion people (2020s). Growth slowing. Most populous countries: India, China, USA.

entries.title: Languages of the World
entries.content: ~7,000 living languages. Mandarin Chinese has most native speakers; English most widespread second language.
